display.name: Temporal Cloud Metrics
display.description: Temporal Cloud namespace metrics (temporal_cloud_v1_* emitted via the Cloud OpenMetrics endpoint). Filter by namespace.

display.name: temporal_namespace
display.description: Filter all panels by Temporal Cloud namespace

display.name: Activity fail / timeout / cancel (/s)
display.description: Per-second rate of failed, timed-out, and cancelled activities.

display.name: Activity start-to-close latency (p50/p95/p99)
display.description: Precomputed activity start-to-close latency percentiles, split by namespace, region, and opt-in activity type when present.

display.name: Activity schedule-to-close latency (p50/p95/p99)
display.description: Per-namespace activity schedule-to-close latency percentiles.

display.name: Activity success (/s) by workflow type
display.description: Successful activity completions per second, grouped by workflow type.

display.name: Activity task failures / timeouts / terminations (/s)
display.description: Activity task-level failures and timeouts plus standalone activity terminations per second.

display.name: Action limit (/s)
display.description: Current configured actions-per-second limit for the namespace.

display.name: Approximate backlog by task queue
display.description: Approximate number of tasks pending in each task queue.

display.name: Billable actions (/s) by action type
display.description: Public Preview billable action rate split by action type.

display.name: Actions used vs limit (/s)
display.description: Actual actions per second versus the configured action limit. Watch this approach the limit.

display.name: Operations used vs limit (/s)
display.description: Actual operations per second versus the configured operations limit.

display.name: Service requests used vs limit (/s)
display.description: Frontend service request rate compared with the configured service request limit.

display.name: Actions and operations throttled (/s)
display.description: Namespace-level throttling against action and operation limits.

display.name: Tasks added with no poller (/s) by task queue
display.description: Tasks added to a task queue while no poller is registered. High values point to workers not running or wrong task queue.

display.name: On-demand envelope limits (/s)
display.description: What namespace limits would be in on-demand mode; in on-demand namespaces these match the current limits.

display.name: Open Workflows
display.description: Currently open workflows in the namespace (gauge).

display.name: Operations (/s) by operation
display.description: Operations performed per second, by operation.

display.name: Operations limit (/s)
display.description: Current configured operations-per-second limit for the namespace.

display.name: Poll success — total vs sync (/s)
display.description: Successfully matched tasks per second, with the sync-matched share.

display.name: Poll timeout (/s) by task queue
display.description: Per-second rate of poll requests timing out (no task delivered).

display.name: Active pollers vs poller limit
display.description: Long-polling service pending requests compared with the configured poller limit.

display.name: Replication lag (p50/p95/p99)
display.description: Cross-region replication lag in seconds (multi-region namespaces only).

display.name: Schedule issues — rate-limited / overrun / missed (/s)
display.description: Per-second rate of schedule actions that were rate-limited, buffer-overrun, or missed their catchup window.

display.name: Scheduled workflows started (/s)
display.description: Successfully scheduled workflow executions per second.

display.name: Service request limit (/s)
display.description: Current configured frontend service requests-per-second limit.

display.name: Service error rate by operation (/s)
display.description: Per-second rate of gRPC errors, grouped by operation.

display.name: Service latency by operation (p50/p95/p99)
display.description: Frontend service latency percentiles per operation.

display.name: Service pending requests (long-polls) by operation
display.description: Pollers long-polling for tasks, grouped by operation.

display.name: Service request rate by operation (/s)
display.description: Per-second rate of gRPC requests, grouped by RPC operation.

display.name: Throttled + resource-exhausted (/s)
display.description: Throttled requests and ResourceExhausted errors per second.

display.name: Total actions (/s)
display.description: Actions performed per second across the namespace.

display.name: Workflow continued-as-new (/s)
display.description: Workflows continued as new per second, by workflow type.

display.name: Workflow failed (/s) by type
display.description: Workflow failures per second, grouped by workflow type.

display.name: Workflow schedule-to-close latency (p50/p95/p99)
display.description: Per-namespace workflow schedule-to-close latency percentiles.

display.name: Workflow success (/s) by type
display.description: Successful workflow completions per second, grouped by workflow type.

display.name: Workflow terminate / timeout / cancel (/s)
display.description: Per-second rate of terminated, timed-out and cancelled workflows.
